name_en: Small 👄FENDI New Versace by Fendi series iconic square Baguette mini bag, white smooth leather material, with three Medusa metal pin decorations on the front flap. FF clasp, with black organic glass and pins. Magnetic snap, purple satin lining interior pocket with inner pocket and gold-finish metal hardware. Comes with a long handle, can be carried underarm. Model: FD8066, Dimensions: 20*13*5cm
